name: Premier Credit Counseling
description_short: Credit repair company that disputes errors and negotiates debt settlements to help consumers improve credit profiles and qualify for mortgages. 12+ years experience with 10,000+ clients.
description_long:
Premier Credit Counseling (operating as Premier Credit Consulting) has been operating for over 12 years, positioning itself as a credit repair and counseling service focused on helping consumers reach homeownership goals. The company emphasizes partnerships with mortgage originators, real estate professionals, and home builders to provide a "customized platform" for credit qualification.

The company offers credit dispute and debt negotiation services. Their website highlights that they go "beyond simply disputing accounts" and work to find "real solutions to valid debts," claiming a 44% average negotiated rate on resolved accounts. Clients can schedule a free credit evaluation to discuss options, and the company provides access to free credit resources including articles and a newsletter.

Premier differentiates itself through its stated focus on mortgage qualification and established partnerships within the real estate industry. They claim to have helped over 10,000 consumers improve their credit profiles and position themselves as advocates for "credit health" rather than purely transactional dispute services. The company maintains business hours Monday-Friday, 9am-8pm MDT for consultant availability.

The company's website lacks transparency on pricing, specific dispute methodologies, licensing, regulatory compliance, and success rates beyond the single 44% negotiated rate metric. Claims of results ("Individual results may vary") are noted, but detailed performance data, customer testimonials, and BBB/regulatory information are absent from their web presence. As a traditional credit repair service, results depend on valid reporting errors and creditor willingness to negotiate—actual outcomes vary significantly by individual situation.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 12+ years of operating history and established partnerships with mortgage originators and real estate professionals
Claims 44% average negotiated rate when resolving valid debts (beyond basic dispute services)
Free credit evaluation available to assess individual situations before engaging services
Offers free credit resources including educational articles and a credit-building newsletter
States focus on finding "real solutions" to valid debts rather than disputing only
10,000+ consumer profiles claimed to have been helped
Extended business hours (9am-8pm MDT, Monday-Friday) for consultant availability
cons: No pricing information disclosed on website; cost of services remains completely opaque
No mention of licensing, regulatory compliance, or certifications (NACM, ICCBC, etc.)
Single performance metric (44% negotiated rate) lacks context—no dispute success rates, timeline data, or detailed case breakdowns provided
No independent verification of claims (BBB rating, customer reviews, regulatory status absent)
Website provides generic disclaimers ("Individual results may vary") without specific success rate data or client testimonials
best_for: Consumers with valid credit report errors who are specifically working toward mortgage qualification
Homebuyers with established partnerships/referrals from mortgage originators or real estate agents already connected to Premier
Individuals with negotiable valid debts seeking settlements rather than dispute-only services
diagnosis: Premier Credit Counseling is a traditional credit repair company best suited for homebuyers with specific mortgage goals and access to referrals from their real estate network. The primary caveat: the company lacks transparent pricing, regulatory verification, and detailed success metrics—potential clients should verify licensing and request specific performance data before engagement.
services: Credit dispute services for inaccurate items on credit reports
Debt negotiation and settlement on valid debts
Partnerships with mortgage originators for streamlined processing
Free educational credit resources and articles
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
